regulatory_risks: Changes in laws, ordinances and regulations relating to lien sale rights and procedures
Americans with Disabilities Act of 1990 compliance requirements
Comprehensive Environmental Response and Compensation Liability Act - potential liability for environmental conditions
State insurance laws and regulations governing tenant reinsurance activities (McCarran-Ferguson Act)
Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act and privacy regulations from Federal Trade Commission
State real estate brokerage laws and regulations for store management activities
Data privacy and security laws governing collection, use, and disclosure of personal information
State and federal regulations relating to natural disasters and public health emergencies
Regulations limiting ability to raise rents or hold auctions during emergencies
Changes in federal, state and local legislation on climate change affecting operating costs and capital expenditures
State of emergency orders limiting rent increases
Potential changes to U.S. tax laws affecting REIT status
REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code Sections 856-860
